f986114f9069d1474b2846b3134c3337: type Option[A]: None Some(A) trait Monad[A]: fun unit[T](a: T) -> Self[T]; fun flat_map[B](self, f: A -> Self[B]) -> Self[B]; fun map[B](self, f: A -> B) -> Self[B] let f = a => Self::unit(f(a)) self.flat_map(f) impl Monad for Option[A]: fun unit[T](a: T) -> Option[T] Some(a) fun flat_map[B](self, f: A -> Option[B]) -> Option[B] match self: Some(v) => f(v) _ => None fun main() -> i32 let x = Some(1) let y = Some(2) let z = Some(3) let result = { do: i <- x j <- y k <- z i + j + k } match result: Some(v) => v _ => 0
